title: ExtraQuests [FTB Quests]
description: Addon adds new tasks, rewards and functions.
body: [![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a071a84cf75714bde606769f94930a500df439c.png)](https://bisquit.host/en) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/29d823752797c8ddecba3d47fc53c53ad26232f1_0.webp) ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/69d504f0a55f35dfc760c75424668d9a6ba20bac_0.webp) * Task a key-value for convenient control of the player’s development progress. * Reward with a key-value for task of the same type. * Additional option to run a command from the console in the command reward. * SDM Shop improvements. * Convenient to use. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78a9a0fac26eb19765db7ac27ae41eadc6979edf_0.webp) * Create tasks for a set of values, can be used for progressive tasks where you need to complete different categories of tasks. * Create daily and weekly tasks to constantly receive resources. * Use console commands to work some mods and plugins. ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/195360eede0cac8ce72e948cf204b1dcc656b6c6_0.webp) [](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge) [](https://modrinth.com/mod/extralib)
